scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/compiler check && bun run --cwd packages/kit check && bun run --cwd packages/vite check && bun run --cwd packages/test check && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/ts-plugin check && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/check check && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/language-server check && bun run --cwd packages/cli check && bun run --cwd packages/create-slate check && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/vscode build && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/zed build
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run --filter='*' check
scripts.test:all: bun run build && bun run test:compiler && bun run test:vite && bun run test:test && bun run test:language-tools && bun run test:cli
scripts.test:language-tools: bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/ts-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/check test && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/language-server test
scripts.vscode:dev: bun run build && open -a "Visual Studio Code" packages/language-tools/vscode
scripts.vscode:package: bun run vscode:build && bun run --cwd packages/language-tools/vscode package
